title: Fletching Overhaul
description: Overhauls the fletching table, allowing for custom Tinker's-style arrow construction.
body:
## Fletching Overhaul
Aren't you just sick of the fletching table having literally no gameplay features? Wait no longer!
![New fletching table GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e4349a8306e620682788815b031bc1cf27b6973.png)

Customise the fletching, shaft, and point of your arrows and optionally add an effect item, too.
![A fletched arrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/103c9d321cadcee20a264ff257e39d0ecaa238aa.png)

Useable items:
- Fletching:
  - Feather
  - Phantom membrane
- Shaft:
  - Stick
  - Blaze rod
  - Breeze rod
- Point:
  - Flint
  - Diamond
  - Echo shard
  - Amethyst shard
  - Prismarine shard
- Effect:
  - Splash potion
  - Slime ball
  - Gunpowder
  - Glowstone

That's over 120 different possible arrow types - discover all the effects! This mod will make your ranged combat in any playthrough far more interesting.

This mod is in beta - please report any bugs you find or any feature requests on the [github page](https://github.com/T0RNATO/fletching_table_upgrade/issues).
